changes: Inner Chaos: Potency has been increased from 660 to 700.
Primal Rend: Potency has been increased from 700 to 720.
Primal Ruination: Potency has been increased from 780 to 800.
Midare Setsugekka: Potency increase from the trait Way of the Samurai III has been changed from 640 to 680.
Kaeshi: Setsugekka: Potency increase from the trait Way of the Samurai III has been changed from 640 to 680.
Gluttony: Potency has been increased from 520 to 560.

Void Reaping: Potency increase from the trait Melee Mastery III has been changed from 560 to 580. Enhanced Void Reaping potency increase from the trait Melee Mastery III has been changed from 620 to 640.

Cross Reaping: Potency increase from the trait Melee Mastery III has been changed from 560 to 580. Enhanced Cross Reaping potency increase from the trait Melee Mastery III has been changed from 620 to 640.
Vicewinder: Potency has been increased from 500 to 540.
Hunter's Coil: Potency has been increased from 570 to 630. Flank potency has been increased from 620 to 680.
Swiftskin's Coil: Potency has been increased from 570 to 630. Rear potency has been increased from 620 to 680.
Reawaken: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
First Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Second Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Third Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Fourth Generation: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Ouroboros: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
First Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Second Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Third Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Fourth Legacy: Reduction in potency after the first target has been changed from 80% to 75%.
Painflare: Potency has been increased from 150 to 220.
Ruby Rite: Potency upon learning the trait Arcane Mastery has been changed from 580 to 620.
Crimson Cyclone: Potency upon learning the trait Arcane Mastery has been changed from 520 to 560.
Crimson Strike: Potency upon learning the trait Arcane Mastery has been changed from 520 to 560.
Necrotize: Potency has been increased from 460 to 500.
Phlegma III: Potency has been increased from 600 to 690.
Eukrasian Dosis III: Potency upon learning the trait Magick Mastery has been changed from 85 to 90.
Psyche: Potency has been increased from 600 to 690.
Recuperate: Cure potency has been increased from 15,000 to 16,000.
Guard: Reduction to damage taken has been increased from 90% to 99%.
Bloodbath: Increase to damage dealt has been changed from 10% to 25%.
Smite: Now ignores the effects of Guard when dealing damage.
Haelan: Cast time has been made instant. Cure potency has been increased from 15,000 to 16,000. Potency is now reduced to 8,000 when targeting self.
Chaotic Spring: Amount of damage dealt absorbed as HP has been increased from 150% to 200%.
Horrid Roar: Recast time has been reduced from 24 to 20 seconds.
Meisui: Regen potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Ogi Namikiri: Potency of the barrier created when attacking two or more targets has been reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Meikyo Shisui: Increase to HP recovered via healing actions has been reduced from 20% to 15%.
Kaeshi: Namikiri: Potency of the barrier created when attacking two or more targets has been reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Tendo Setsugekka: Cure potency has been reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka: Cure potency has been reduced from 10,000 to 8,000.
Bloodcoil: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Slither: Movement speed has been increased from 25% to 50%.
Sanguine Feast: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
World-swallower: The additional effect "Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP" has been added.
Curing Waltz: Cure potency has been reduced from 12,000 to 10,000.
Xenoglossy: Charge time has been reduced from 16 to 15 seconds.
Flare: Potency has been increased from 13,500 to 15,000.
Freeze: Potency has been increased from 9,000 to 10,000.
Soul Resonance: The effect duration of Elemental Star has been increased from 30 to 60 seconds.
Mountain Buster: The additional effect "Reduces damage taken by 15%" has been added with a duration of 5 seconds.

Corps-a-corps: The effect of Monomachy which increases damage dealt to target has been increased from 10% to 15%. The effect of Monomachy which reduces damage taken from target has been increased from 10% to 15%.
Forte: Effect duration has been increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Smudge: Duration of increased movement speed effect has been reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Retribution of the Madeen: Potency has been reduced from 16,000 to 14,000.
Cure III: Potency is no longer reduced after the first target.
Pneuma: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 28 seconds.

new_content.name: In Fate's Footsteps
new_content.description: A new main scenario quest for Disciple of War or Magic level 100. Players must first complete the main scenario quest 'Into the Mist.'

new_content.name: ??? (Main Scenario Quest)
new_content.description: A new main scenario quest for Disciple of War or Magic level 100. Players must first complete the main scenario quest 'In Fate's Footsteps.'

new_content.name: The Hollow Promise
new_content.description: A new Chronicles of a New Era quest for Disciple of War or Magic level 100. Players must first complete the Chronicles of a New Era quest 'Apocalypse Nigh.'

new_content.name: The Wing Spirit Cometh
new_content.description: A new level 1 sidequest. Players must first progress to a certain point in the Patch 7.5 main scenario quests and obtain several specific mount wings.

new_content.name: The Clyteum
new_content.description: A new dungeon for level 100 Disciples of War or Magic (average item level 750 or above). Players may enter with Trust, Duty Support NPCs, or in explorer mode.

new_content.name: The Unmaking
new_content.description: A new trial for level 100 Disciples of War or Magic with an average item level requirement of 755 or above.

new_content.name: The Unmaking (Extreme)
new_content.description: A new extreme trial for level 100 Disciples of War or Magic with an average item level requirement of 770 or above. Accessible via the Raid Finder.

new_content.name: Shinryu's Domain (Unreal)
new_content.description: A new Unreal trial for level 100 Disciples of War or Magic with an average item level requirement of 690 or above. Accessible via the Raid Finder.

new_content.name: Windurst: The Third Walk
new_content.description: A new 24-player alliance raid dungeon for level 100 Disciples of War or Magic with an average item level requirement of 755 or above.

new_content.name: Auxesia
new_content.description: A new cosmic exploration destination scheduled to release in Patch 7.51.

new_content.name: Tool Enhancement Quests - Cosmic Tools
new_content.description: New tool enhancement quests scheduled to release in Patch 7.51.

new_content.name: Tiisol Ja
new_content.description: A new custom deliveries client scheduled to release in Patch 7.51.

new_content.name: Dancing Mad (Ultimate)
new_content.description: A new Ultimate-difficulty raid scheduled to release in Patch 7.51.

new_content.name: The Occult Crescent: North Horn
new_content.description: A new field operation exploration zone scheduled to release in Patch 7.55.

new_content.name: Weapon Enhancement Quests - Phantom Weapons
new_content.description: New weapon enhancement quests scheduled to release in Patch 7.55.

new_content.name: Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures sidequests
new_content.description: New sidequests scheduled to release in Patch 7.55.

new_content.name: Allied Society capstone sidequests
new_content.description: New Allied Society sidequests scheduled to release in Patch 7.55.

new_content.name: Beastmaster
new_content.description: A new limited job scheduled to release in Patch 7.56.

new_content.name: Archeia Harmonias
new_content.description: A brand-new Crystalline Conflict PvP arena featuring dynamic tactical elements including Aetherometers, Aetherial Bridges, Jump Glyphs, and Healing Glyphs.

new_content.name: Increase to Furnishing Placement Limits
new_content.description: A major system update that increases the indoor and outdoor furnishing placement limits for apartments, private chambers, cottages, houses, and mansions.

new_content.name: Consolidation of Dyes
new_content.description: A major update consolidating standard dyes into three types: Standard Spectrum Dye, Wide Spectrum #1 Dye, and Wide Spectrum #2 Dye.

new_content.name: Configuration Sharing
new_content.description: A new system feature allowing players to upload hotbar, HUD, macro, and character configuration settings of their logged-in character to the server, generating a Share Code to apply them to another character.

new_content.name: Updates to the Armoire
new_content.description: An update allowing class and job-specific gear and gear from Patch 7.0 onward to be stored in the armoire, renaming the 'Artifact Armor' tab to 'Class/Job Gear' and adding a 'Dungeon Gear' tab.

new_content.name: Updates to Outfit Glamours
new_content.description: A system update adding additional outfit glamours, a 'Try On' subcommand to the glamour creation window, and the option to remove individual pieces from a set.

new_content.name: Updates to Group Pose
new_content.description: A system update introducing new stickers, a Portrait Mode button, a 'Soft Focus' feature, and Eye Settings to adjust eyelids.

new_content.name: Ocean Fishing Update
new_content.description: A system update adding a new route unlocked after completing the main scenario quest 'Endwalker,' along with new bonuses and voyage missions.

new_content.name: Free Trial Expansion
new_content.description: A system adjustment raising the free trial level cap to 80 and granting free trial players access to the Shadowbringers expansion content.

housing.name: Charcoal Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall that can be left bare or laden with decorations, depending on one's mood.

housing.name: Dark Wood Flooring
housing.description: This dark wood lends an intimate air to any room while also making inevitable blemishes on the floor less apparent.

housing.name: Square Ceiling Lamp
housing.description: This unobtrusive lighting fixture brightens a room without drawing the eye upward.

housing.name: Garden Mood Lighting
housing.description: Perfect for setting a festive mood far past the point when everyone should have gone home.

housing.name: Semicircular Outdoor Stage
housing.description: For thespians whose brilliance cannot be bound by the stifling walls of a theater.

housing.name: Lattice Window Seat
housing.description: The large window behind this seat provides a luxurious view of the world without.

housing.name: Minimalist Poplar Partition
housing.description: A simple partition which is perfectly functional without any adornments at all.

housing.name: Minimalist Poplar Partition Door
housing.description: A partition equipped with the minimum number of doors required to allow passage.

housing.name: Everkeep Platform Bed
housing.description: These low beds are a common sight in the homes of Everkeep.

housing.name: Everkeep Sofa
housing.description: Despite its utilitarian look, this sofa is the perfect place for long hours of lounging.

housing.name: Curved Everkeep Sofa
housing.description: A curved sofa which allows for face-to-face conversations more easily than traditional shapes.

housing.name: Everkeep Partition
housing.description: A simple partition with slits that allow people on either side to peer at each other playfully.

housing.name: Everkeep Dining Table
housing.description: A sleek dining table whose dark surface hides traces of any food-related mishaps.

housing.name: Everkeep Round Table
housing.description: A simple round table that can be found in dining rooms across Everkeep.

housing.name: Everkeep Sideboard
housing.description: A spacious sideboard favored by many an Everkeep resident for its stylish design.

housing.name: Everkeep Chest
housing.description: A chest popular in Everkeep for its relatively compact size and generous storage.

housing.name: Everkeep Kitchen Counter
housing.description: A wide kitchen counter equipped with enough drawers to accommodate culinarians of all persuasions.

housing.name: Everkeep Monitor
housing.description: Ubiquitous within Everkeep, these monitors are an essential part of day-to-day life in the city.

housing.name: Everkeep Stereo
housing.description: Debates abound as to whether the quality of the sound these devices emit justifies their cost.

housing.name: Rod of Nihility Display
housing.description:
A pitch-dark display stand. The tenebrous aura of a powerful voidsent emanates from within.
※One per estate only.

housing.name: Everkeep Wall Decoration
housing.description: A decoration sometimes found in the homes of Everkeep's more discerning residents, who insist they understand its meaning.

housing.name: Everkeep Rug
housing.description: A large rug woven with a pattern that has become the talk of Everkeep.

glamour.name: Rule-breaker's Set
glamour.description: A Level 1 cosmetic gear set consisting of the Rule-breaker's Visor, Rule-breaker's Vest, Rule-breaker's Gloves, Rule-breaker's Bottoms, and Rule-breaker's Boots.

glamour.name: Shadowhound Set
glamour.description: A Level 1 cosmetic gear set consisting of the Shadowhound Helm, Shadowhound Armor, Shadowhound Gauntlets, Shadowhound Cuisses, and Shadowhound Sabatons.

glamour.name: Black Shuck Set
glamour.description: A Level 1 cosmetic gear set consisting of the Black Shuck Helm, Black Shuck Armor, Black Shuck Gauntlets, Black Shuck Cuisses, and Black Shuck Sabatons.

glamour.name: Plain Hooded Tunic
glamour.description: A Level 1 cosmetic chest piece available in Plain, Oversized, and Form-fitting variants.

glamour.name: Succubus Hooded Tunic
glamour.description: A Level 1 cosmetic chest piece available in Succubus, Oversized Succubus, and Form-fitting Succubus variants.

glamour.name: Festival Hooded Tunic
glamour.description: A Level 1 cosmetic chest piece available in Festival, Oversized Festival, and Form-fitting Festival variants.

glamour.name: Twill Trousers
glamour.description: A Level 1 cosmetic leg piece available in Straight-cut, Bell-bottom, Baggy, Worn, and Stonewashed variants.

glamour.name: Cornflower Wristlets
glamour.description: Level 1 cosmetic wrist accessories crafted from cornflowers, available in Red, Blue, Yellow, Green, Orange, Purple, White, Black, and Rainbow variants.
